title: Lekebaby 6 Pack Classic Baseplates, 10"x10" Large Building Board Base Plates 100% Compatible with All Major Brands, For Kids Over Three Years Old,Green/Blue/Grey
features: Compatible & Tight: Nice and thick and the engineering is precise - fitting well with major brand bricks in market. As they are slightly thicker than major brand base plates so there is less flex so much better for moving around if you have a building or something built on it
Material:ABS plastic, won't break or bend easily. These durable, flat construction base plates will remain firmly in place as your little builders get to work on their awesome creations
Infinite Creativity: With Lekebaby base boards you can create your own dream town, manor, or even city. Let imagination run wild
Specifications: 32x32 studs, 10" x 10", large enough to make big models and scenes, it's an ideal starter set whether you need fields, water or cityscape plates
Customer Support: We offer comprehensive customer service, ensuring a satisfactory purchase experience,take it, and you'll know this is the base plate you want
description: Product Description Give a Nice Tight Connection Even when attaching single blocks or standing mini-figs on one leg, there's no movement and everything feels nice and solid. Specifications Dimesnions: 10 x 10 inch (25cm x 25cm) Specification: 32 x 32 Studs Weight: 120g Colour: Green/Grey/Blue Material: High qutality ABS plastic Package Includes: 2 baseplates in green 2 baseplates in grey 2 baseplates in blue Smooth Underside If you're planning to glue them to a larger board or play table, these are perfect. Work perfectly Building and displaying your creation in front of everyone. Gift Idea A perfect gift for anyone who love playing with building block.
